base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bosses_atlas — a character (final_boss) from 1988 ninja gaiden. All bosses — Barbarian (Act 1), Bomber Head (Act 2), Basaquer (Act 3), Kelbeross 2-dog (Act 4), Bloody Malth (Act 5), Masked Devil + Jaquio + Demon (Act 6 final). 854×1626 tall canvas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: All bosses — Barbarian (Act 1), Bomber Head (Act 2), Basaquer (Act 3), Kelbeross 2-dog (Act 4), Bloody Malth (Act 5), Masked Devil + Jaquio + Demon (Act 6 final). 854×1626 tall canvas
